text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Can I ask you for the ultimate favor?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I want you to massage my shoulders! I have
a huuuge headache.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll be able to pound all that pain away
with your love for me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Look, even when I try this... Pain, pain, go away...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Why'd I do that?! Now it hurts... even more than this morning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I make Mayano Top Gun take some
medicine for her headache, but it doesn't go
away...
